perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman is positioned in front of a camera, holding a large clear plastic bag filled with red-marinated chicken feet. She carefully pours the contents onto a clear glass plate. (2) She picks up a piece of chicken foot with a fork and eats it, showing an exaggerated expression of surprise and then enjoyment. (3) She continues to eat various components of the dish, including green vegetables, while nodding and giving thumbs-up gestures. (4) As the spiciness takes effect, she fans her mouth with her hand and reaches for a bottle of banana milk. (5) She pours the milk into a glass, adds a dark liquid from a small sachet, and stirs it before drinking. (6) She smiles, looks satisfied, and continues eating and gesturing towards the camera until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, fast-paced electronic background track starts immediately. (2) A female voice speaks in an energetic, high-pitched tone in Mandarin, describing the food. (3) Extremely loud, crisp, and rhythmic crunching and munching sounds (ASMR) become the primary focus as she eats. (4) The sounds of a plastic bottle being opened and liquid pouring into a glass are clearly audible. (5) The background music remains consistent throughout the video, and the speaker maintains a lively dialogue with occasional pauses for the eating sounds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "韓國最新流行 辣檸檬涼拌雞爪" (Korean trend: Spicy Lemon Cold Chicken Feet) - Hook text. (2) "在韓國為了吃這個 有些人甚至等1-2個月" (Some in Korea wait 1-2 months for this) - Functional informative text. (3) "有點出乎意料的味道耶！" (Unexpected taste!) - Expressive reaction. (4) "OMG！！！超級好吃" (OMG!!! Super delicious) - Emotional peak. (5) "( ASMR )" - Functional genre label. (6) "咬起來的聲音大到 自己都覺得折磨" (Chewing so loud it's torture) - Humorous commentary. (7) "辣？那就要喝香蕉牛奶" (Spicy? Then drink banana milk) - Functional solution text. (8) "我要加瘦身咖啡液" (I want to add slimming coffee liquid) - Product/Action identification. (9) "幸福指數 + 100" (Happiness index + 100) - Emotional variety-show style tag. (10) "台灣也有類似辣味涼拌雞爪嗎？" (Does Taiwan have similar chicken feet?) - Call to action question.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Food Pouring -> ASMR Eating Experience -> Spicy Reaction -> Drink Preparation -> Outro

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with long brown hair, wearing a white shirt and light blue nail polish.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic setting featuring a white bed with white linens and a floral patterned pillow.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Presentation -> Sensory Experience -> Conflict (Spiciness) -> Resolution (Drink) -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video's primary purpose is to share a viral food trend and provide entertainment through ASMR eating and expressive reactions. It also implicitly promotes a slimming coffee product by integrating it into a lifestyle solution for alleviating spiciness.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator highlights a 'slimming coffee liquid' as part of her drink recipe while eating.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-intensity ASMR audio focus combined with vibrant food visual presentation.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical short-form influencer content focusing on trending food items, leveraging the ASMR niche to drive engagement and retention.
